action.reasoning: Observation: best still 0.5889 (iter11: replay500/task+KD beta0.5/T2+consol5eps, val~0.59, early tasks~0.46-0.5 late~0.7-0.8). Iters12-15 degraded (0.57->0.46->0.13->0.08) due to train.py truncation (incomplete after mem update line; high loss~4, train_acc~0.04 post-task0, val~0.06, only t0 learned). Curves show logs but no learning. Analysis: root cause=long file truncation in workspace/response; prior good run had complete balanced mem (meta+torch.where/randperm), full KD (KLDiv on softmax/T**2), per-epoch val/best tracking, post-task mem update+combined train, consolidation. Hyperparams sensitive but replay+KD+consol proven. Decision: fully rewrite COMPLETE non-truncated train.py (mem=500/task balanced per-class via meta+torch, epochs/task=6, consol=5@lr=1e-4, Adam(5e-4 wd1e-5), KD beta=0.5 T=2.0 with proper KL, dense log every20steps+val/epoch+best on val, old_model deepcopy, final best ckpt with model_state_dict key). Keep model.py/predict.py. This recovers >0.58, targets ~0.61. Run train then submit_eval.
